description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request to the main branch, on push to the main branch, and nightly. Use a job matrix to test on ubuntu and macos with Python 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11. For each job, check out the repository, set up micromamba with a specified environment, install the package, run tests with pytest and coverage, and upload coverage to CodeCov if the repository matches and the event is a pull request.
